strengths.observation: Completion gate runs identical checks locally and in CI; self-validates MANDATORY_AGENTS vs agent files
413 tests pass across 11 files covering every consumer script
PR-template parser hardened against documented adversarial findings
Dependabot exemption keyed to GitHub-verified author identity, not spoofable body/branch
Actions SHA-pinned, minimal permissions, PR number via env, uv --frozen
Zero runtime deps; stdlib-only invariant AST-gated; dev deps exact-pinned
install.py validates path containment before any write, with escape tests
[verify] allowlist self-documents as defense-in-depth with interpreter denylist + metachar rejection; no shell=True
README leads disqualifiers-first and flags unbuilt features as planned

score_rationale.code_quality: Clean, typed, dataclass-based; 413 tests incl. AST invariants. <9 because mypy/ruff strict not locally confirmed and am_i_done.py is 1703 lines.
score_rationale.design_quality: Coherent CheckResult/Report abstraction, deterministic-over-inference applied. Held by monolithic gate module + heavy scaffolding around modest code.
score_rationale.security: No shell=True/eval; list-form subprocess; verify-allowlist + path containment; honest scoping comments. Strong for the threat model.
score_rationale.supply_chain: Zero runtime deps, AST-gated stdlib invariant, SHA-pinned actions, --frozen, Dependabot + weekly CodeQL. Reference-quality for this size.
score_rationale.utility_claude_code: Real done-gate + commands + agents + persisted reviews + phase tracking, installable as a Skill. Value depends on adopting the ceremony; real-world adoption evidence thin.
score_rationale.accuracy: Source-derived counts check out; README honest. 'every Phase-1 item has a persisted review' overstated: 16 of 30 completed items have dedicated reviews; rest covered by batch/phase reviews.
score_rationale.maintenance: Active disciplined history, drift-detector, clean tree, 3.11-3.14 matrix. Held at 7: sustainability of 10.7k md lines of process by a small team unproven.
score_rationale.utility_vs_complexity: Central tension: ~4.7k LOC Python carries 29 ADRs, 10.7k md lines, 8 agents, multi-cycle review at v0.1.0. Candidly acknowledged + opt-in gated, but apparatus-to-capability ratio is high; accretion concern well-founded.
